title: Stallions Cricket Club records a 41-run victory
description: GRAAFF-REINET - On a sweltering day in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET - On a sweltering day in Graaff-Reinet, the Stallions side took on Willowmore at the Botanics grounds in a T20 match.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET - On a sweltering day in Graaff-Reinet, the Stallions side took on Willowmore at the Botanics grounds in a T20 match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After losing two early wickets, Jean-Pierre (JP) Phillips and Samuel Bantom steadied the ship and the team ended on 157/5 - a very useful score mainly due to a captain's knock by JP Phillips who scored 64 runs not out.","html":"After losing two early wickets, Jean-Pierre (JP) Phillips and Samuel Bantom steadied the ship and the team ended on 157/5 - a very useful score mainly due to a captain's knock by JP Phillips who scored 64 runs not out."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Willowmore accepted the challenge and after nine overs had posted a healthy 69 runs without the loss of a wicket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, once the first wicket fell, the visitors succumbed to tight bowling from the Stallions and their run-chase came to an end.","html":"However, once the first wicket fell, the visitors succumbed to tight bowling from the Stallions and their run-chase came to an end."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After 20 overs the Willowmore side stood on 116/5 - 41 runs adrift.","html":"After 20 overs the Willowmore side stood on 116/5 - 41 runs adrift."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The win was a great start for the Stallions, who are defending their 2023 title.","html":"The win was a great start for the Stallions, who are defending their 2023 title."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stallions will face United on 27 January on the Fred Hufkie Oval in Kroonvale.","html":"Stallions will face United on 27 January on the Fred Hufkie Oval in Kroonvale."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Stallions Cricket Club records a 41-run victory
